name: HeroSection
description: Full-width hero section with title, subtitle, and call-to-action button. The primary visual element at the top of a landing page.

ctaHref.description: URL or anchor the CTA button links to (e.g., '#contact')

name: MenuSection
description: Displays a list of items with names, descriptions, and prices. Commonly used for restaurant menus, service lists, or product catalogs.

items.description: Array of menu items, each with: name (string, required), description (string, optional), price (string, required)

name: ContactSection
description: Contact information section displaying business address, phone number, email, and a section title. Typically placed at the bottom of the page.
